raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/scrub> 2025, I purchased XXXX miles from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX using my American Express card ending in XXXX. My statement shows I was charged four identical transactions, each for USD XXXX ( total USD XXXX ). In XX/XX/year>2025, XXXX XXXX XXXX unilaterally removed the miles from my account without any notice or authorization and has refused to refund me. I filed complaints with the XXXX and XXXX consumer authorities on XX/XX/year>2025 and XX/XX/scrub> 2025, and I opened disputes with Amex. Two of the four charges have been refunded ; the other two remain unresolved and correspond to Amex dispute case numbers XXXX and XXXX. I have repeatedly submitted evidenceincluding account screenshots showing the mileage removal, transaction records, communications with the merchant, and the consumer-authority filingsbut XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX refused mediation and provided what I believe are false/insufficient service rendered documents, which Amex has repeatedly accepted to deny refunds on the two remaining charges. For reference, the Transaction Reference Numbers ( TRN ) for the four charges are : XXXX, XXXX, XXXX, XXXX. Amex has not clearly mapped these TRNs to dispute outcomes, making it impossible for me to confirm from TRNs alone which two were refunded and which two were not.
